title: A review long reflection on Evangelion and the Rebuilds
display_title: A review long reflection on Evangelion and the Rebuilds
wikitext: []: A review/long reflection on Evangelion and the Rebuilds             Quote Post by ericortlund » Thu Dec 29, 2016 3:19 pm Dear Friends, I've admired and searched this site for a long time, but never participated. After 3.33 came out, however, although I was originally totally confused, I wound up really liking it. I tried to write down why and it turned into a super long thing about why I like *all* the version of Evangelion, even the original TV ending. Because I am old, I still write on a blog. If you're curious, any comments would be most welcome. Here it is: http://scatterings1976.blogspot.co.uk/2 ... -love.html Thanks - Eric

After 3.33 came out, however, although I was originally totally confused, I wound up really liking it. I tried to write down why and it turned into a super long thing about why I like *all* the version of Evangelion, even the original TV ending. Because I am old, I still write on a blog.
